delivery_claim_rule: Chat text and final gate MUST NOT claim delivered/attached/sent until delivery acknowledgements exist.
local_path_rule: User-facing chat text MUST NOT expose absolute local filesystem paths. Outbox payload_path may be relative to run_dir only.
delivery_manifest_update_rule: outbox_delivery_worker.py MUST recompute delivery-manifest.json, attachment-ledger.json, final-answer-gate.json, and runtime-status.json after ACKs.
